name: pr-writeup
description: Markdown sibling of the pull-request writeup for reviewers: TL;DR, motivation with before/after, a file-by-file tour with code, review-focus callouts, a test plan, and a staged rollout. The agent pre-renders the before/after/changes/focus/testPlan/rollout collections into lists before substitution.

slots.description: PR number, woven into the h1 (e.g. '#312').
Pre-rendered header meta stats (file count, diff stat, branches, author) as an inline list.
The request that produced this writeup.
Motivation prose explaining why the change is needed.
Pre-rendered bullet list of prior behavior.
Pre-rendered bullet list of new behavior.
Pre-rendered file-by-file tour: one heading per changed file with badge, diff stat, rationale, and an optional code fence.
Pre-rendered numbered list of reviewer-attention callouts.
Pre-rendered test-plan checklist; check verified rows.
One-line framing of the rollout plan.
Pre-rendered list of staged ramp steps.

shape.changes[]: { file: string, badge: enum[new,mod,del], lines: string (diff stat), why: string, code: string (optional snippet) }
shape.testPlan[]: { step: string (label), expectation: string (note), done: boolean }
shape.rollout[]: { when: string, pct: string, d: string }
